title: OpenAI credentials unselecting issue in workflows
symptom: When trying to select OpenAI credentials in workflows, they keep unselecting themselves, making workflows unrunable.
not_this_if: Only one workflow is using the credentials
root_cause: The issue arises when multiple workflows or subworkflows share the same OpenAI credentials, leading to conflicts in selection. This can cause credentials to be deselected unexpectedly, disrupting workflow execution.
fix_steps: Delete all AI Model subnodes from the AI Agents
Re-add the AI Model subnodes and re-select the OpenAI credentials for each workflow
agent_instruction: Delete and re-add AI Model subnodes to resolve credential selection issues.
